web.title: Aman Miami Beach | Condos for Sale, Plans Prices
web.description: Aman Hotel & Residences Miami Beach is a luxury beachfront complex consisting of two white 16-story towers.
web.markdown:
![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/menubarmrg_bg2.png)

[![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/MRG-LOGO-White.png)](https://miamiresidential.com/)

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/Logo-Aman-Miami-Beach.png)

Your browser does not support the video tag.


![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/01-Aman-Miami-Beach-Building.jpg)

# Aman Miami Beach

### **Miami Beach / 2028**

16 Stories / 120 Residences of
1, 2 & 3 Bedrooms

**3425 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33140, USA**

Aman Hotel & Residences Miami Beach is a luxury beachfront complex consisting of two white 16-story towers; the first one is a redevelopment of the historic Versailles hotel; the second new 221-feet-tall tower was conceived by internationally acclaimed architectural firm, Luis Revuelta. The buildings feature striking architecture, views of the city and water, and a combination of 56-key hotel and 23 condo residences on the Versailles. The Kengo Kuma-designed tower, on the other hand, offers 41 condos residences with one to three bedroom models. Inspired by Miami's elegance and uniqueness, Kengo Kuma captures the essence of South Florida, blending harmoniously with Miami Beach's historic Art Deco streets. Residences at Aman feature private balconies, stainless steel appliances, floor to ceiling windows, and much more. Its location is conveniently close to exclusive shopping, gourmet markets, beaches, high-end nightlife, world-class shopping on Lincoln Road, museums and art centers.

This content is preliminary and is not the official information of the developer.

This project is currently in under construction and prices start at $4,000,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/amanmiamibeach#contactform) for more information.

This project is currently in under construction and prices start at $4,000,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/amanmiamibeach#contactform) for more information.

## Features

### Building Features

- Receptionist and concierge
- Elegant Lobby
- Social Room
- Pool
- 24 Hour security
- State of the art fitness center
- Common areas for play, sports and relaxation

### Residence Features

- High-­efficiency air conditioning and heating system
- Prewired, smart home management technology
- Floor­-to­-ceiling glass windows and sliding doors
- Washer/dryer in all condos
- Stainless steel kitchen appliances
- Private balconies with breathtaking views of the city and water

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/07-Aman-Miami-Amenities.jpg)

## Location

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/26-Developer-Blavatnik-and-Doronin.jpg)

Len Blavatnik is an American industrialist and philanthropist whose firm, Access Industries, owns a distinct portfolio of over 6 million square feet across iconic hotels and other commercial and residential properties in the United States, Europe, South America, and the Caribbean. Along with Alan Faena, Blavatnik developed the neighboring, luxury condo building, [Faena House.](https://miamiresidential.com/faena-house)

Vladislav Doronin is the chairman of Aman Resorts, in addition to being CEO of real estate development brand OKO Group. OKO Group’s Miami portfolio also includes the luxury residential condos [Missoni Baia](https://miamiresidential.com/missonibaia) and [Una Residences.](https://miamiresidential.com/una-residences/)
